summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Soletra word game application. Both backend API and frontend UI are working perfectly with full integration between components.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint returns correct message
POST /api/solve with B+A,U,D,T,O,R returns exactly 238 words and 6 pangrams
API validation correctly rejects missing center letter (422)
API validation correctly rejects missing outer letters (422)
API validation correctly rejects wrong number of outer letters (422)
API validation correctly rejects empty letters (422)
API handles accented letters correctly (Ç+A,O,R,T,E,S returns 1376 words)
API returns 0 results for rare letter combinations (X+Z,Q,W,Y,J,K)
Frontend hexagonal layout renders correctly with all 7 inputs
Center letter input accepts single letters and rejects special characters
All 6 outer letter inputs function correctly with data-testid attributes
Generate button is disabled when inputs are empty or incomplete
Generate button becomes enabled when all 7 letters are filled
Word generation works correctly with API integration
Results are properly grouped by word length (4 letras, 5 letras, etc.)
Pangrams are highlighted with sparkle icons and green styling
Reset button clears all inputs and results correctly
Responsive design works on mobile (390x844) and tablet (768x1024)
Auto-focus behavior works when filling outer letters
Input validation prevents multiple letters and special characters
Word groups are properly ordered by length
Empty state message displays correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and interactions working)
